reviews.review_title: The VR version needs more work
reviews.review_description: Software is Unusable due to Multiple Troubleshooting Bugs. It's impossible to work in troubleshooting mode, especially with refrigerators and washing machines. I repeatedly get stuck on steps, like removing components, and the simulation just doesn't let me proceed, even after restarting and following all the steps. There are too many bugs for effective training in this mode

reviews.review_title: Doesn't let me click to the next videos
reviews.review_description: It's like my buttons aren't working when I click to the next video, it needs work please

My hands are stuck in the ground on this app. I keep deleting it and reinstalling plus I am almost done with my free trial and still haven't been able to use it. I've changed room scale hoping since I can reach the hands it will track but still nothing

You are certainly on the right track. Creating a learning based environment in a virtual setting where you can be anywhere in the world and allow the learner to make real-world mistakes safely is genius. Look forward to seeing more content.

reviews.review_title: I love it... but that dang tape measure.
reviews.review_description:
I am truly learning a lot in these courses. The hands-on training is so essential for me. I don't absorb much without practical application. Buuuut that dang tape measure keeps bugging out. And because it stops working I can't continue the training. The following training emulations  is where I've discovered the problem.

- CNST108: Interior Finishing: Drywall.  (Tape measure won't work)
- Build an Exterior Wall: Wall Section (Pen disappears and you can never make the mark)
This is a great addition to our trade. Stand alone vr trade training. Simple and engaging. You can really tell who's interested in training or not with this software.

and well laid out interface! i wish there was a way to purchase a subscription or course by clicking on the specific content itself, and maybe add to the app description that a sub is required for most content. I'll most likely be using this soon, for various things! I love the unlimited potential for apps like this

reviews.review_title: My Dad Uses This ALL the time!

reviews.review_description: I've tried to login or sign up but it says your app is out of date when I've updated it twice now would love to use this on my Oculus
